sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1996" key="a)qhri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀθηρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n1996.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">want of game</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ael.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">N A</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.2</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n1996.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">immunity from being hunted</tr_>, ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.1</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="3" id="n1996.2" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">want of experience in hunting</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
